title: Magnetic Stirrer 2000rpm, Magnetic Stir Plate with Stir Bar, Mini Magnetic Mixer Stirrer Max Stirring Capacity 2000ml, Lab Stirrer (No Heating)
description:
Powerful：Mini Magnetic with stepless speed regulation 350-2000RPM and max stirring quantity 2000ML
Easy Use：Magnetic stirrer with compact design, easy to operate, 12v voltage for mobile use, maximum speed 2000RPM, please use our dedicated power plug, otherwise it may affect the machine speed
High Lab Quality Material：Magnetic Stirrer Maintenance-free brushless DC motor enable stable and strength operation，Frosted countertop are wear-resistant, corrosion-resistant and easy to clean
Portable For Wide Use：Perfect for stirring in scientific research, industry, agriculture, health and medicine, homebrew, like brew yeast starters,wine making,Juice mixing and etc
Notice For Use: Please use a beaker or a container with a flat and thin bottom. Put the stir bar into the container first, and then slowly turn the knob to keep the stir bar synchronized with the magnetic field, so as to obtain the best use effect.Please note there's no beakers in our package
reviews_5s:
The WEST TUNE 3000rpm Magnetic Stirrer Mixer is a true gem for any laboratory or research setting. This versatile and powerful magnetic stir plate mixer, equipped with a brushless DC motor, has proven to be an essential tool for achieving precision mixing with ease and reliability.

One of the standout features of this magnetic stirrer mixer is its robust motor. The brushless DC motor not only provides consistent and reliable performance but also offers impressive power, allowing for efficient stirring of even high-viscosity liquids. With a maximum capacity of 3000ml, it can handle a wide range of applications, from small-scale experiments to larger research projects.

The 3000rpm stirring speed is ideal for various types of solutions and can be adjusted to suit the specific requirements of your experiment. The stir bar, which comes included, ensures that the magnetic field is transmitted evenly and efficiently throughout the liquid, resulting in thorough and consistent mixing.

The sleek black and white design of the mixer adds a touch of modernity to your laboratory, and its compact size ensures it doesn't take up excessive space on your workbench. It's a well-designed and aesthetically pleasing addition to your lab equipment.

The ease of operation is another significant advantage. With straightforward controls and an easy-to-read LED display, you can set the stirring speed and monitor it with confidence. The non-slip silicone feet provide stability during operation, preventing any unwanted movement.

One key thing to note is that this magnetic stirrer mixer does not provide heating capabilities ("No Hot"). It is primarily designed for agitation and mixing purposes. If you require a heated platform for your experiments, you may need to consider a separate solution.

In conclusion, the WEST TUNE 3000rpm Magnetic Stirrer Mixer is an exceptional tool for laboratories and research environments. Its brushless DC motor, adjustable stirring speed, and efficient mixing make it a top-tier choice for precise and consistent results in your experiments. While it does not have heating capabilities, it excels in its primary function of agitation and mixing. I highly recommend the WEST TUNE Magnetic Stirrer Mixer to researchers and scientists who demand quality and reliability in their laboratory equipment. It's a reliable companion for your scientific endeavors.Works as it should. Runs quiet, great price.Was affordable and worked well!I am using this to stir my konjac paste for 30 minutes which I did not want to do by hand. The machine works well during that time. It is also great to stir inks that have separated - the small magnetic stirrer works great for that. I just have to find out how to take the stirring magnet out without making a huge mess!I have run this stirrer for weeks at a time in all sorts of different ambient temperatures, and it continues to work. The magnets are powerful, and the stirring is much faster and provides much more shear than the stirring on my hot plate. Additionally, the stir bars included are great. I’m buying a second. I can’t believe this product is only $20!Great quality stirrer for the price. High rpm and solid base. I bought extra magnets to get more of the larger size that I needed. Very durable.Works well! We used it to mix saltwater aquarium chemicalThis was a game changer!
I made a few bottles of "magic potion" with mica glitter and food coloring.
When shaken it has a super cool swirling action.
Now I don't have to shake it up I just put it on the stirrer and it's an instant magic apothecary!
I will probably pick up a couple more.Hot tip. You know when you drain gets clogged, and you finally can't take it anymore, you go spend like ten dollars on a bottle of drain cleaner that may (if you're lucky) or may not unclog your drain. No more! For the same price I get a jar of NaOH place a glass of cold water on top of this, drop in a stir rod, and slowly add NaOH until warm. Wait till dissolved, slowly pour down drain, wait, run hot water. If needed rinse and repeat. Oh, expect you'll get about 50 uses out of that bottle of NaOH, it takes very little. Anyways, this badboy saves me the trouble on manually slowly stirring the stuff in while breathing caustic vapors.I cook and bartend a lot. I ordered two glass beakers to go along with this mixing gizmo. I find it fun to prepare homemade salad dressing and just let it mix and mix while I do other things. Plus, it's a device that'll make your guest say "I've never seen one of those before!". That's fun all by itself. I also like to make my own simple syrup for cocktails. This will do the trick for normal simple syrup but not for rich simple syrup (2 parts sugar to one part water). It doesn't have the strength to stir extremely thick mixtures, but I knew that from reading the product description. A really fun "nice to have" device for kitchen use... not a need to have... but that's not the point for me.
reviews_1s:
I ordered this as part of a gift. I have one and ordered the same one. The first one worked for about a minute, then stopped. Checked the outlet, plugged in different outlets, doesn't work. Sent it back for an exchange, get the new one, it won't even turn on. Tried multiple outlets.I only had this product for a month and it only worked one time. Do not recommend.Everything, piece of junk!Stir plate worked great for about 6 weeks but now the battery will not accept a charge and the unit will only work when plugged into a USB cable. The whole purpose of battery operation is not to be plugged in. Excellent product till the battery failed but sadly I can not rate this highly since it's not reliable.Play Video
It was ok, I mean it worked for what I needed it for.
Not sure what the issue was but when the liquid in the far was going really fast most of the time it would knock the magnet off balance and if have to start all over.
I went to use it today and the magnet with pop into place but now it won't stir.

I've had it 2 months, I Guess you get what you pay for.This thing quit on the first use. Had three powders to mix in a little under 1L of water. Mixed the first just fine (4g). Put in the second (2g) and the stirring stopped before it was mixed. Probably actually worked for around one minute. Not a product I can get behind at all.Work good for a while but even with very little use over 6 months it stopped workingThe packaging and design is really sharp. But, the product didn't work when it arrive. After messing with the power supply and the connection it started working. Every 5 mins it would shut off and take 2 mins to get it to turn on again.I was worried the magnet would be strong but works perfect. Update after a year it quit workingThe power supply that comes with this has a USB C connector. However, it isn't actually a USB C power supply. It provides 12v only.

This will destroy many USB C devices. USB C power supplies must provide 5v only, unless the device requests a higher voltage. Many smaller devices only want 5v or 9v; 12v will most likely destroy them.

You can't use a standard USB C charger to charge this stirrer. Only the power supply that it shipped with works. Why didn't they use a round barrel plug? I have no idea - but shipping a USB C plug that doesn't actually use USB C is very dangerous.
